Eastern & Central Washington Senior Living Facilities & Care Homes

27 senior living communities in the Eastern & Central Washington region of Washington, organized by city.

How Washington regulates senior care

Assisted living facilities and Adult Family Homes are licensed by DSHS; Washington has one of the largest small-home (Adult Family Home) sectors in the country. License & inspection lookup: Washington DSHS Aging and Long-Term Support Administration.

New to this?

Start with how to choose a facility, levels of care, and the touring checklist.

← All Washington regions

About the stars: on a nursing home, ★ is its Medicare government rating (from inspections and staffing); elsewhere, ★ is a family-review average (read it with care). We list every community we can verify, not just the highest-rated — why, and what our labels mean.

Senior Living Community is an independent information resource for families. We are not a referral service and do not provide medical, legal, or financial advice — for decisions about care, consult the professionals involved. Facility details change; always confirm directly with a community. Last data review: 2026-07-11. Run a senior living community? Claim your free listing or see our marketing services for communities.
